content:
💡 InnerTune | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide an enhanced, ad-free music listening experience for YouTube Music on Android devices, with advanced playback and customization features.
✨ Key Features: • Ad-free YouTube Music playback • Background playback • Search songs, videos, albums, and playlists • Login support • Cache and download songs for offline playback
📖 Summary: InnerTune is an Android application that provides a Material 3-themed client for YouTube Music. It allows users to stream music from YouTube Music without ads, offering features like background playback, offline downloads, synchronized lyrics, and Android Auto support.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
